docs: https://docs.easypost.com/docs/shipments (official EasyPost docs fetched 2026-07-04; pages covered: core Authentication/Pagination plus Addresses, API Keys, Batches, Carrier Accounts/Metadata/Types, Customer Portal, CustomsInfo, CustomsItem, EndShipper, Events, Insurance, Claims, Luma, Orders, Parcels, Pickups, Refunds, Reports, ScanForm, Shipments, Forms, Rates, Returns, Shipping Insurance/Refund/SmartRate, SmartRate, Trackers, Users, Billing, Brand, Child Users, ReferralCustomer, Webhooks)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion for the documented EasyPost REST API v2 surface available to an API-key integration. Covered reads include all practical bulk/list GETs that the declarative engine can sync without caller-supplied object IDs, plus legacy GET /parcels retained from the hand-written connector. Covered writes include documented JSON/empty-body object lifecycle and operational actions expressible by writes.json. Exclusions are detail GETs that duplicate covered list streams, credential/billing/carrier-account administration requiring elevated scope or sensitive credentials, binary/document-download surfaces, and stateless calculation endpoints that do not mutate or expose syncable records.

excluded.reason: single-shipment detail; the shipments stream emits the same Shipment object shape for all discoverable shipments
label conversion/download endpoint returns or points at label artifacts; this connector emits label metadata but does not download binary label files
per-shipment SmartRate calculation requiring a caller-supplied shipment id, not a syncable record collection
per-shipment delivery-date SmartRate calculation, not persisted syncable data
per-shipment precision-shipping calculation, not persisted syncable data
documented options and return-shipment variants use the same POST /shipments resource; create_shipment accepts the full shipment envelope including options/is_return
stateless rate quote calculation; does not create/update a persistent EasyPost object and returns transient quote data
single-tracker detail; the trackers stream emits the same Tracker object shape
single-address detail; the addresses stream emits the same Address object shape
single-parcel detail; legacy EasyPost exposes a parcels list stream and the detail shape is the same Parcel object
single-insurance detail; the insurances stream emits the same Insurance object shape
single-batch detail; the batches stream emits the same Batch object shape
single-carrier-account detail; the carrier_accounts stream emits the same CarrierAccount object shape
creates account-level carrier credential configuration and accepts carrier credentials; intentionally not exposed as a generic write action
updates carrier credential/account configuration; requires elevated account administration and sensitive credential handling
removes carrier-account configuration and can break live shipping workflows
single-id lookup only; there is no documented bulk CustomsInfo list stream to sync without caller-supplied IDs
single-id lookup only; there is no documented bulk CustomsItem list stream to sync without caller-supplied IDs
single-end-shipper detail; the end_shippers stream emits the same EndShipper object shape
single-event detail; the events stream emits the same Event object shape
single-claim detail; the claims stream emits the same Claim object shape
claim creation is documented around evidence/invoice/supporting-document attachment payloads; binary/base64 evidence upload is outside the generic JSON write surface
single-id lookup only; the docs expose order create/buy/detail but no bulk Order list stream to sync
single-pickup detail; the pickups stream emits the same Pickup object shape
single-refund detail; the refunds stream emits the same Refund object shape
single-scan-form detail; the scan_forms stream emits the same ScanForm metadata shape
report type is a caller-selected asynchronous export namespace rather than a fixed syncable collection; create_report covers report job creation
single report job/file retrieval ultimately exposes export artifacts; this connector does not download report files
standalone SmartRate deliver-by calculation; transient quote/estimate, not a persisted mutation or syncable collection
standalone SmartRate deliver-on calculation; transient quote/estimate, not a persisted mutation or syncable collection
credential administration surface; responses include API-key metadata and are not a shipping data stream
creates account API credentials; intentionally not exposed as an automated write action
disables an API key and can break other integrations using it
credential administration endpoint outside the connector's shipping data scope
deletes an API key and can permanently break other integrations using it
creates an embedded customer-portal session/link, not a syncable data write
single user/account detail; child_users stream covers the bulk child-user collection, and account self-detail is administrative metadata
unscoped authenticated-user update can mutate account billing/recharge settings; ID-scoped update_user covers child/user object updates
brand update supports image/base64 logo/ad payloads and account branding configuration, outside the generic shipping-data write surface
partner/referral-customer provisioning uses partner/referral-user credentials and account-management scope distinct from ordinary shipping data
updates referral-customer account data using partner/referral-user credentials; elevated account-management surface
stores referral-customer payment method references; billing/payment scope
issues referral-customer account refunds; financial operation outside the connector's executable write surface
billing/payment-method listing; sensitive financial account administration, not shipping data
payment setup intent creation for billing; requires elevated billing/payment scope
stores credit-card/payment method references; billing/payment scope
bank-account financial connection session creation; billing/payment scope
stores bank-account payment method references; billing/payment scope
moves funds from a bank account into EasyPost balance; financial operation
charges a credit card to fund EasyPost balance; financial operation
removes a stored bank-account payment method; billing administration
removes a stored credit-card payment method; billing administration
single-webhook detail; the webhooks stream emits the same Webhook object shape
